communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Maryland Public Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

I am seeking all reports related to Use of Force (UoF) incidents created since March 3, 2026.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 calendar days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Nicholas H Santos

title: FOIA E. Mcdermott - USMC United States Marine Corps - Department of the Navy

communications.subject: Freedom of Information Act Request: FOIA E. Mcdermott - USMC United States Marine Corps - Department of the Navy
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

MILITARY SERVICE RECORD INFORMATION - OMPF for subject below
Name - Edward V. McDermott
Branch - United States Marine Corps USMC - Dept of the Navy
Approximate Service dates - 1991 to 2011

Please provide the following military service information:
1. Dates of service, dates of ranks, stations, list of awards, unit decorations
2. Silver Star award citation
3. copy of Bronze Star Medal award citations
4. Military Education/ training courses
5. Chronological record of assignments Form NAV MC 118(3)
6. request hard copy of navy commendation award citations
7. Military specialties, schools - Form NAVMC 118(8a)
8. NAVMC 118(3) Record of Service
9. Administrative Remarks

First name: Edward
last name: McDermott

Historical research Military History. Redact per U.S.C. § 552(b)(6).

If necessary, mail hardcopies to 
MUCKROCK NEWS
263 HUNTINGTON AVE
BOSTON, MA 02115

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Eric Bradley
